name: Oyster Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook celery, onion, and bay leaf in butter or margarine until vegetables are tender but not brown. Discard bay leaf.
2. Add bread cubes and parsley to the vegetable mixture; mix thoroughly.
3. Drain oysters, reserving liquid. Chop oysters and add them to the bread mixture with eggs, poultry seasoning, 1 teaspoon salt, and a dash of pepper.
4. Add milk to the oyster liquid to make 1/3 cup. Add enough of this liquid to the stuffing to moisten it.
5. Makes enough stuffing for a 10 to 12 pound turkey.
